overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through rural Japanese farmland at dusk. The character traverses rice paddies, crosses a stream, and approaches a distant fire while the sun sets over coastal fields.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path flanked by rice paddies and traditional farm buildings

entered.detail: wooden Japanese farmhouse with tiled roof situated among trees
flooded rice fields with young plants arranged in stepped terraces
narrow earthen trail winding through the farmland
tree-covered hills rising in the distance against the dark blue sky

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a dirt farm path at dusk, with a traditional wooden farmhouse on the left and flooded rice paddies on the right. The path leads toward forested hills under a deep blue sky, with haystacks visible in the fields.

events.description: approaching pond with NPC working in the water
crossing stream via wooden stepping stones and planks

agents.ego_description: walking along the pond edge and carefully crossing the shallow stream on wooden planks

notable_agents.action: peasant bending down working in the pond water near the rocks

entered.detail: calm reflective water surface surrounded by rock embankments
simple wooden plank bridge crossing the narrow section of the pond
large stones lining the edge of the water
dense tree cover creating a darker enclosed space ahead

segments.scene_description: The path leads to a pond where a peasant works in the water. The character walks along the stone embankment and crosses the stream using wooden planks, entering a more forested area with dense canopy overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through the forest toward a column of black smoke visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall trees with thick trunks flanking both sides of the path
thick black smoke rising into the sky indicating a fire ahead
traditional Japanese stone lantern beside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail ascends through dense forest with tall grass and trees lining both sides. An ominous column of black smoke rises in the distance ahead, and the path becomes rockier as it climbs past a stone lantern.

scene_state.functional_zone: burned area with coastal sunset view

events.description: passing burned cart and smoldering wreckage on the right
emerging from forest to face the setting sun over coastal rice fields

agents.ego_description: walking past the burned wreckage and pausing to view the sunset over the flooded fields

entered.detail: smoldering wooden cart wreckage with smoke rising from the remains
flooded rice paddies reflecting the golden sunset light with ocean beyond
bright sun sitting low on the horizon casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character passes a smoldering burned cart on the right, evidence of recent destruction. Emerging from the tree line, the view opens to reveal the setting sun casting golden light over flooded coastal rice fields, with the ocean visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet rural farmstead through a darkening forest and finally out toward a golden coastal horizon. It begins with a samurai walking a dirt path between a wooden farmhouse and flooded rice paddies under a deep blue dusk sky. As the path leads toward a pond, the camera follows the character across wooden planks over a stream and into a dense forest canopy. The scene then shifts as the trail ascends through tall grass and rocky terrain past a stone lantern, while an ominous column of black smoke rises in the distance. Finally, the camera passes a smoldering burned cart and emerges from the tree line to reveal the setting sun casting golden light over coastal rice fields and the distant ocean.
